ekioplot 0.4.0
  • Reference
    • Getting Started with ekioplot
  • Palette Lab

Package index

Themes

Apply EKIO visual identity to plots and tables

theme_ekio()
Apply EKIO Theme to ggplot2 Plots
theme_ekio_map()
Apply EKIO Map Theme to ggplot2 Plots
gt_theme_ekio()
Apply EKIO Theme to GT Tables

Scales

Color and fill scales for ggplot2. Each topic also documents its fill and British-spelling aliases (e.g. scale_fill_ekio_d, scale_colour_ekio_d).

scale_color_ekio_d() scale_colour_ekio_d() scale_fill_ekio_d()
Discrete Color Scale
scale_color_ekio_c() scale_colour_ekio_c() scale_fill_ekio_c()
Continuous Color Scale

Palettes

Access and explore color palettes

ekio_pal()
Get Color Palette
list_ekio_palettes()
List Available Palettes
show_ekio_palette()
Display a Palette
show_all_ekio_palettes()
Show All Palettes

Color Scales

Named color vectors for direct use

ekio_blue
EKIO Primary Blue Scale
ekio_gray
EKIO Neutral Gray Scale
ekio_teal
EKIO Teal Scale
ekio_orange
EKIO Orange Scale
ekio_accent
EKIO Named Accent Colors

Recipe Functions

High-level chart builders with smart defaults

ekio_histogram()
EKIO Histogram
ekio_lineplot()
EKIO Line Plot
ekio_scatterplot()
EKIO Scatter Plot
ekio_barplot()
EKIO Bar Plot
ekio_areaplot()
EKIO Area Plot

Datasets

ips_brasil
IPS Brasil 2025 - Social Progress Index for Brazilian Municipalities
brazil_population
Brazilian Municipal Population Data (2025)
brazil_gdp
Brazilian Municipal GDP and Economic Structure (2021)
brazil_agriculture
Brazilian Municipal Agricultural Production (2022)
brazil_agriculture_states
Brazilian State-Level Agricultural Production Time Series (1974-2023)
fuels
Global Fuel Consumption by Source

On this page
